name: Chocolate-Chip Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve coffee granules in boiling water; set aside.
2. Combine sugar, milk, and butter in a heavy saucepan; cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves.
3. Cook over medium-low heat until mixture reaches soft ball stage (238°F). Remove from heat.
4. Add coffee, marshmallow cream, and vanilla. Stir until blended.
5. Let cool to lukewarm (110°F).
6. Beat until mixture begins to thicken.
7. Gently stir in mini-morsels just until partially melted.
8. Pour mixture into a greased 13- x 9- x 2-inch baking pan.
9. Let cool completely, and cut into small squares.
10. Store in an airtight container. Yield: 3 pounds
